channel.title: flove making-of — privacy questions
channel.description: New privacy design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should flove apps have analytics?
item.description:
• No analytics — Keep it private. No tracking, no data. Matches §3.10.7. • Self-hosted (Matomo) — Full control, privacy-respecting, but requires hosting. • Privacy-first (Plausible) — Lightweight, GDPR-compliant, cloud-hosted. Easy but external. • Basic counters only — Simple hit counters per page. Minimal, self-contained.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: No analytics
